issue_title: Visual styles not being applied in the Login page
issue_body_preview:
There is a bug where fonts and color are not being applied to the /login route

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/17838461/55282284-c96d8400-531f-11e9-849e-2138966b9a1d.png)

The issue could possibly be related to the moment Auth is instanced in the Admin.vue component. We don't
test_description_zh: 访问 /login 路由，观察登录页面的整体视觉样式，包括字体、颜色、输入框和按钮的样式是否正确渲染。
expected_result_zh: 登录页面应正确应用所有视觉样式，包括正确的字体、颜色主题、输入框样式和按钮样式，页面外观与设计一致，无样式缺失或回退到浏览器默认样式的情况。
